name_cn:
🎉New Arrival Crossbody Bag🎉1BD345🎉🎉
Streamlined curved design gives this shoulder bag a refined and modern charm. Versatile style, comes with 2 short/long adjustable straps, suitable as a handbag, shoulder bag, or crossbody. Modern glossy leather adds the finishing touch. Features a flap silhouette, blending sophistication with functionality. A timeless classic, ladies. Get yours now🎉🎉
24x11x4cm🎁
